title: Kengia festucacea
taxonomy: Kengia festucacea is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. It belongs to the tribe Festuceae and is native to certain regions. The classification of Kengia festucacea is further categorized within the genus Kengia, which is a group of grasses. The exact classification can be stated as: Kengia festucacea (Bor) Clayton. The classification helps in understanding the plant's evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
